zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie de Champagne Queen of Constantinople於1174年3月21日出生在法國哈帕格-亞登奧布特洛也斯時，她的父親Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagne46歲，母親Marie de France28歲。她於1186年1月6日與Empereur latin de Constantinople Baudouin de Hainaut VI在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德瓦倫希恩斯結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1204年8月9日在土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾享年30歲，埋葬在土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marie de Champagne Queen of Constantinople于1174年3月21日出生在法国哈帕格-亞登奧布特洛也斯时，她的父亲Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagne46岁，母亲Marie de France28岁。她于1186年1月6日与Empereur latin de Constantinople Baudouin de Hainaut VI在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德瓦倫希恩斯结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1204年8月9日在土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾享年30岁，埋葬在土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Champagne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Andre, Armand, Marcel, Lucien, Cecile, Emile, Normand, Pierre, Alain, Antoine, Evens, Fernand.

French: habitational name from Champagne, a historical province in the northeast of France, named in Latin as Campania (from campus ‘plain, flat land’). This is also the name of various villages in France, and in some cases the surname may derive from one of these. This surname is also found in Haiti (see also 2 below). Compare Champaign , Champaigne , Champine , and Shampine .
Haitian: from Champagne (see 1 above), used as a nickname or personal name.

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie de Champagne Queen of Constantinople was born on 21 March 1174, in Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, her father, Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagne, was 46 and her mother, Marie de France, was 28. She married Empereur latin de Constantinople Baudouin de Hainaut VI on 6 January 1186, in Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 9 August 1204, in Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Türkiye, at the age of 30, and was buried in Fatih, İstanbul, Türkiye.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie de Champagne Queen of Constantinople est née le 21 mars 1174, à Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagne, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Marie de France, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Empereur latin de Constantinople Baudouin de Hainaut VI le 6 janvier 1186, à Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 août 1204, à Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquie, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterrée à Fatih, İstanbul, Turquie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marie de Champagne Queen of Constantinople am 21. März 1174 in Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagne 46 und ihre Mutter Marie de France 28. Sie hat am 6. Januar 1186 in Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich Empereur latin de Constantinople Baudouin de Hainaut VI geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. August 1204 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Türkei und wurde in Fatih, İstanbul, Türkei begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de Champagne Queen of Constantinople è nata il il 21 marzo 1174 nel Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, sua padre, Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagne, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Marie de France, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Empereur latin de Constantinople Baudouin de Hainaut VI il 6 gennaio 1186, nel Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 9 agosto 1204, nel Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turchia, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolta a Fatih, İstanbul, Turchia.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie de Champagne Queen of Constantinopleが1174年3月21日にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベトロイスで生まれた時，父Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagneは46歳，母Marie de Franceは28歳であった。1186年1月6日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードベレンシエンスでEmpereur latin de Constantinople Baudouin de Hainaut VIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1204年8月9日にトルコイスタンブルファティイスタンブルで30歳で死去し，トルコイスタンブルファティにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie de Champagne Queen of Constantinople(이)가 1174년 3월 21일 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 오브 트로예스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagne(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie de France(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1186년 1월 6일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 발시네스에서 Empereur latin de Constantinople Baudouin de Hainaut VI(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1204년 8월 9일 튀르키예 이스탠불 팻이h 이스탠불에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 튀르키예 이스탠불 팻이h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de Champagne Queen of Constantinople nasceu em 21 de março de 1174, em Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagne, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Marie de France, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Empereur latin de Constantinople Baudouin de Hainaut VI em 6 de janeiro de 1186, em Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de agosto de 1204, em Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquia, com 30 anos, e foi sepultada em Fatih, İstanbul, Turquia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie de Champagne Queen of Constantinople родилась 21 марта 1174 г. в местности троиесь, ауб, чампагне-арденн, Франция, её отцу по имени Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagne было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie de France, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Empereur latin de Constantinople Baudouin de Hainaut VI 6 января 1186 г. в местности веиленсиеннесь, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 9 августа 1204 г. в местности истанбул, фатих, истанбул, Турция в возрасте 30 лет и была похоронена в местности фатих, истанбул, Турция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marie de Champagne Queen of Constantinople nació el 21 de marzo de 1174, en Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagne, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Marie de France, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Empereur latin de Constantinople Baudouin de Hainaut VI el 6 de enero de 1186, en Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de agosto de 1204, en Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquía, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultada en Fatih, İstanbul, Turquía.
